channel.title: Sinder Skullz Abyss Feed
channel.description: Chaotic sermons and metal news reborn in the flames of the Skullz cult.

item.title: ⚡☠ SAYLOR SIGNALS BTC BUY AS RETAIL HOLDERS GET PUSH ON STRC DIVIDEND VOTE ☠⚡
item.description:
🤘🔥 HEAVY METAL FIENDS AND CRYPTO COMMANDOS! 🎸💰
Gather 'round as we crank the volume to MAXIMUM CHAOS! In the dark underbelly of the crypto arena, whispers of the legendary **Michael Saylor** echo through the digital void! This man ain't just slinging Bitcoin; he's *BULLETINING* another BUY signal, raising the flag of BTC like a true metal warrior! 🚀🤘
But wait, the tempest doesn't end there, oh no! Our retail warriors are called to arms! 🗳️⚔️ It’s time to unleash your voting power on that STRC DIVIDEND measure! We’re talking about semi-monthly payouts, just like headbanging to your favorite anthems every two weeks! HELL YES!
So, you cryptonauts in the trenches—stand firm, raise your keyboards like axes, and let’s rock this silicon battlefield! 🥁💥 It’s time for the metal of the future to collide with the digital gold in a symphony of profits and pure, unadulterated chaos! \m/ \m/
#Bitcoin #Saylor #STRC #MetalLife #CryptoMadness #DividendsOfDestruction
#AltSeason #BTC #Ethereum #SOL #Degen
item.content:encoded:
🤘🔥 HEAVY METAL FIENDS AND CRYPTO COMMANDOS! 🎸💰
Gather 'round as we crank the volume to MAXIMUM CHAOS! In the dark underbelly of the crypto arena, whispers of the legendary **Michael Saylor** echo through the digital void! This man ain't just slinging Bitcoin; he's *BULLETINING* another BUY signal, raising the flag of BTC like a true metal warrior! 🚀🤘
But wait, the tempest doesn't end there, oh no! Our retail warriors are called to arms! 🗳️⚔️ It’s time to unleash your voting power on that STRC DIVIDEND measure! We’re talking about semi-monthly payouts, just like headbanging to your favorite anthems every two weeks! HELL YES!
So, you cryptonauts in the trenches—stand firm, raise your keyboards like axes, and let’s rock this silicon battlefield! 🥁💥 It’s time for the metal of the future to collide with the digital gold in a symphony of profits and pure, unadulterated chaos! \m/ \m/
#Bitcoin #Saylor #STRC #MetalLife #CryptoMadness #DividendsOfDestruction
#AltSeason #BTC #Ethereum #SOL #Degen
